block.create_alerted.alarm.tooltip.summa: A _configurable_ redstone-controlled _alarm block_ that can produce _various sounds_. _Right-click_ to open the configuration interface to select _alarm type_ and _redstone link frequency_. Use any _dye_ to change the color of the light.
block.create_alerted.smoke_detector.tool: Detects _fire_ within a radius and triggers an _alarm_ while emitting a _redstone signal_.
